name: Avida, Rebuilder of Worlds
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>双</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ａ－ｖｉｄａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アヴィダ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by there being at least 8 or more Link Monsters with different names on the field and/or in the GYs. You cannot Special Summon other monsters the turn you Special Summon this card. This card's Special Summon cannot be negated. If this card is Special Summoned: Shuffle all other monsters that are banished, on the field, and in the GYs into the Decks. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.

action: Returns from field to Extra Deck
Returns from Graveyard to Extra Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Deck
Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
